creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
It looks like the problem is that graphics/evince port used the wrong option to disable keyring:

===>  Configuring for evince-lite-3.28.2_1
configure: WARNING: unrecognized options: --disable-keyring

It should already be fixed by r484781, which replaces 'KEYRING_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=keyring' with 'KEYRING_CONFIGURE_WITH=keyring'.
